arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Bodo/Glimt - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim takes charge of his first home game at Old Trafford plus updates from Tottenham vs Roma
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the two Europa League games involving Manchester United vs Bodo/Glimt and Tottenham vs Roma.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou issues Destiny Udogie and Timo Werner injury update ahead of Tottenham vs Roma
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has confirmed that there are "no issues" with Destiny Udogie and Timo Werner's fitness ahead of Tottenham's Europa League showdown against Roma. Post game he was sore but he played 60 minutes with a sore ankle.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou already has the first name on Tottenham teamsheet vs Roma despite injury issues
arts.sum: As Tottenham's No.30 has another month to wait until he can step back onto the pitch in a Premier League game, it is vital that Spurs keep his match fitness up to ensure his levels don't drop too much by the time it comes to the Nottingham Forest match. Bentancur is going to have to bide his time to return to Tottenham's Premier League XI but he is available for selection for Spurs' Europa League home tie against Roma on Thursday evening as his ban only applies to domestic games.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Roma Europa League clash predicted as Dominic Solanke impresses
arts.sum: It was a hugely impressive win for the Lilywhites, and now, all attention turns to the Europa League, with Spurs welcoming Roma to north London. Tottenham will be looking to build on their fantastic victory last weekend with another three points against Roma in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou Tottenham masterplan was already working before Man City win as Liverpool warned
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou oversaw arguably his best result as Tottenham head coach last week when Spurs demolished reigning Premier League champions Manchester City 4-0. It leaves Spurs at 0.38 points worse off in the league per match this season than they should be.

arts.ttl: Allegri presence at Tottenham-Roma fuels Premier League reports
arts.sum: Former Juventus coach Max Allegri will be in the stands for tonight’s Europa League game...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Roma LIVE! Europa League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Spurs have been unsettled by injury but take on an Italian side in disarray

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Roma Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Tottenham host Roma as they look to get their Europa League campaign back on track following their 3-2 loss at Galatasaray earlier this month. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for...

arts.ttl: Europa League | Tottenham Hotspur v Roma: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s defensive crisis has taken another hit with the news that goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario has undergone surgery for a fractured ankle. The Italian shot-stopper, who played through the injury during Spurs’ impressive 4-0 victory at Manchester City, is now sidelined for an undetermined period. This latest setback compounds Ange Postecoglou’s defensive headaches, as the team is already without first-choice center-backs Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven. In their absence, Radu Dragusin and Ben Davies are expected to continue their partnership at the heart of defense, following their commendable performance against City.
